title: 菊花賞の後に・新時代の予感

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The race is over... Mejiro Ryan's impassioned
shouts of victory echo throughout the course.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite having lost, Mejiro McQueen
compliments Ryan on her win, declaring this the
beginning of a golden age for the Mejiro family.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With this great achievement, the Kikuka Sho
draws to a close.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our next race is the Arima Kinen. Mejiro Ryan
must now prepare for a race where many new,
strong opponents await.
